history.text:
[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: The image shows a dark-themed game UI screen labeled “LEVEL UP!” with a profile card displaying level, experience, and counts for messages and XP needed.

Setting:
The setting appears to be a digital interface on a flat, dark background, with no visible physical environment, time of day, or weather.

Visual Details:
At the top center, the text “LEVEL UP!” appears in large gold letters with small gold decorative shapes on both sides. In the center of the image, a rounded rectangular panel with a dark gradient background contains the main information. On the left side of the panel, there is a circular avatar image with a bright, colorful illustration and a red banner-like element across the lower part; the avatar border is purple and pink. To the right of the avatar, the name “Kayz Assisten” is displayed in large white text, with a small gold pill-shaped label to the right that reads “#2”. Beneath the name is smaller white text reading “LEVEL PROGRESS”. Further right, there are two side-by-side rounded rectangles: one purple box showing “LEVEL” and a large white number “5”, and one teal box showing “EXPERIENCE” and the progress “2 / 300” with “2 / 300” in larger white text. Below these, there is a long, thin horizontal progress bar in a darker gray; at the far right of the bar area, a “0%” label appears in white. Near the bottom of the panel, three smaller dark rounded boxes show “MESSAGES” with “108”, “XP NEEDED” with “298”, and “NEXT LVL” with “6”. Very faint text centered near the bottom reads “Congratulations on leveling up!” The camera angle is straight-on, and the composition is centered with consistent spacing and rounded UI elements.

Visible Text:
LEVEL UP!
Kayz Assisten

5

Congratulations on leveling up!
Hu Tao

Practical Summary:
A dark game interface shows a level-up screen with a profile name, ranking label, and level progress details. It displays level 5, experience progress “2 / 300,” and counts for messages, XP needed, and the next level.
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
